articles.title: SRT Sales Cost Likely to Rise as War Fuels Economic Uncertainty
articles.description: Banks are likely to face higher costs in issuing significant risk transfers as investors become more demanding in the face of growing economic uncertainty, according to a Bloomberg Intelligence survey conducted when traders were already assessing the prospect of a US military intervention in Iran.
